name: excel-mcp-go
description: Lightweight Go-based MCP server for reading and writing xlsx/xlsm/xltx/xltm and CSV files. Cross-platform native binary with no Node/Python runtime required.
author: allo-official

tools.name: read_excel
tools.description: Read an xlsx/xlsm/xltx/xltm file and return data as JSON.

tools.name: read_csv
tools.description: Read a CSV file and return data as JSON.

tools.name: write_excel
tools.description: Write JSON data to an xlsx or CSV file. Correctly formats integers and floats to avoid scientific notation.

notes: Ships as a native Go binary via npm; no Python or Node runtime required at install time. Ideal as a lightweight fallback to the heavier Node/Python Excel MCPs.
